title: hyoscyamus albus var. major
intro: Hyoscyamus albus var. major, also known as white henbane, is a variety of the hyoscyamus albus plant, belonging to the nightshade family and native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It contains tropane alkaloids, specifically scopolamine and hyoscyamine, which have been used for centuries in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including sedation, pain relief, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of white henbane include its ability to treat anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms, as well as its use as a local anesthetic. White henbane is often used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, teas, and ointments, although it is essential to use it under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its potential toxicity and side effects.
